title: Number 7 Candles 7th Birthday Galaxy Gradient Happy Birthday Purple Blue Gradient Candle Premium Wax & 3D Diamond Design Cake Topper Decorations for Birthday Party Anniversary Celebration Supplie
features: 【CANDLES INFORMATION】you will receive 1 number 7 birthday candle, The galaxy gradient theme candle size is approx. 6 cm/ 2.5 inches in length, total length (include the candle pick) is approx. 12 cm/ 4.7 inches. This perfect candle size fits any size birthday cake and cupcake, adding a certain charm to your cake.

【SAFE MATERIAL AND PACKAGING】Our galaxy gradient birthday candles are made of environmentally friendly materials, safe and odorless, the candles burn for a long time, long enough for you to sing the happy birthday song and make your wish until you are ready to blow it out.

【UNIQUE CRAFTSMANSHIP】3D Diamond Vision Candle has a diamond shaped surface with a powerful 3D three-dimensional effect, just like the cut surface of a diamond. Gorgeous candles make your party unique and impressive.

【LONG LASTING BRIGHT FUNCTION CANDLE】These carefully designed galaxy gradient birthday candle supplies provide long lasting light to make the event more charming; The bright from these candles fills the room with soft, warm light, enhancing the overall ambience and making your celebration an unforgettable occasion

【MULTIPURPOSE CELEBRATION ESSENTIAL】This cupcake topper design can be easily applied to all kinds of occasion celebrations, and it also matches easily with all kinds of themed party decorations. It is not only for children's birthdays but for adult birthdays. Ideal cake decoration for many occasions, such as boys girls birthdays, baby showers, anniversaries, retirement parties, family reunions, weddings, galaxy gradient parties, even Christmas, Perfect decorations for party cakes.
description: Product description Number 7 Candles 7th Birthday Galaxy Gradient Happy Birthday Purple Blue Gradient Candle Premium Wax & 3D Diamond Design Cake Topper Decorations for Birthday Party Anniversary Celebration Supplie ﻿ Easy to Use Galaxy gradient candles can be easily inserted into the cake and held securely in place, these candles are not only beautiful, but also practical and easy to use, adding joy to your celebration! ﻿ Delicate Appearance Beautiful galaxy gradient birthday cake candles are meaningful for you to celebrate your birthday and nice cake topper decoration for embellishing your cake and cupcake, bright glow for creating romantic atmosphere and adding a touch of elegant ﻿ Specifications: Material: paraffin wax Color: as pictures shown ﻿ Package includes: 1 x galaxy gradient Number Candles ﻿ Notes: Please keep the candles away from children and pets. Remove all packaging materials before burning candles. Do not light candles near flammable materials. Please completely extinguish the candle without supervision. Please keep the candles in shade away from the fire. ﻿ Safety Warning Please keep the candles away from children and pets. Remove all packaging materials before burning candles. Do not light candles near flammable materials. Please completely extinguish the candle without supervision. Please keep the candles in shade away from the fire.
